content:
@Danilo Krummrich IIUC, you mentioned that you're doing something like "using slice to represent memory region", if so, there are some previous discussions:

This is a discussion started by me on using slice to represent a memory region
https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/ZiFsCLb-BZWbBHsu@boqun-archlinux/

Here is some discusion on how to make things aligned with pointer provenance:

https://rust-lang.zulipchat.com/#narrow/stream/136281-t-opsem/topic/.E2.9C.94.20Pointer.20provenance.20on.20.60.26.5BUnsafeCell.3Cu8.3E.5D.60/near/434438742
